article.title: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
article.summary: The filing expands Grayscale’s growing lineup of crypto-related exchange-traded products outside of Bitcoin and Ether.

headline: Celsius Founders Slammed with $6M FTC Penalty

article.title: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
article.summary: The settlements add to former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky’s $10 million FTC settlement in April.

headline: SBI Funds Surge 8.5% in $1B India Debut

article.title: SBI Funds Rises 8.5% in Debut After $1 Billion India IPO
article.summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. shares rose 8.5% in their Mumbai debut Tuesday after investors piled into the company’s $1 billion initial public offering, making it one of India’s most heavily subscribed billion-dollar share sales.

headline: Oil Plunges 4% Amid Global Demand Slump

article.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
article.summary: Brent oil slipped after surging almost 6% over the previous two sessions, as traders weighed continued hostilities between the US and Iran against efforts to broker a new ceasefire.

headline: Korea's CBDC Pilot Expands to 500,000 Users

article.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
article.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

headline: Russia's Crypto Bill Near Passage With 2 Votes Remaining

article.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
article.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

headline: SEC Charges $22M Crypto Mining Fraud Scheme

article.title: SEC charges Florida man and company in alleged $22 million crypto mining fraud scheme
article.summary: The defendants allegedly raised $22 million from more than 380 investors through a fraudulent crypto asset mining scheme.
